description: The ProtectedRoute component's permission check logic has a critical flaw: if `permission` prop is undefined, the check passes automatically for non-admin/owner users. Line 75-79 should require explicit permission grant or admin role, not allow access by default when no permission is specified.
successCriteria: When permission prop is undefined, non-admin/owner users are denied access
Access is only granted if user has the specific permission OR has admin.manage_all
The logic clearly handles the undefined permission case with explicit denial
